name: Falcon-7B
archDisplay: Causal decoder-only Transformer, 7B (32 layers, multiquery attention, RoPE, FlashAttention)
note: Apache-2.0 causal decoder trained on 1.5T RefinedWeb tokens; the small, widely-adopted entry point of the original Falcon line.

results.notes: 5-shot, from TII's own 'Falcon Series of Open Language Models' tech report Table 21. TII notes Falcon-7B underperforms on MMLU relative to other tasks, likely due to their web-heavy pretraining mix.
From Table 21 of the Falcon tech report (outlining choices in the prompt, per their Section 6.1 methodology).
From Table 21 of the Falcon tech report.
From Table 21 of the Falcon tech report; footnoted there as measured without outlining candidates in the prompt, since performance is otherwise close to random for the 7B model.

5-shot GSM8K acc (0.046247) from the archived HF Open LLM Leaderboard details dataset for tiiuae/falcon-7b, latest run 2023-12-03T17:58:16 (harness|gsm8k|5). GSM8K was not previously tracked at all for this model.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via HF model card (tiiuae/falcon-7b) and TII/ATRC press coverage: 7B params, Apache 2.0, 2048-token (2K) context, released May 25 2023 together with Falcon-40B/1.3B. open-llm-leaderboard-avg 48.8 confirmed verbatim on huggingface.co/blog/falcon. Corrected langCount 9→11: the card's language list (English, German, Spanish, French primary + Italian, Portuguese, Polish, Dutch, Romanian, Czech, Swedish limited) is identical to Falcon-40B's and totals 11, not 9.
